description: Smart Home Air Intelligence — B2C home air quality monitoring + B2B fleet HVAC management in one app
features: EPA-based AQI calculation from PM2.5/PM10 readings
Multi-room monitoring with per-room air quality scores
6 pollutant metrics: PM2.5, PM10, CO2, VOC, temperature, humidity
Filter lifecycle tracking with change reminders
Fleet dashboard for B2B property management
Smart alerts for AQI spikes, CO2, VOC, humidity
